meaning: adj.膨胀的,膨胀性的,有扩张作用的
examples: As a special viscous soil, dilative soil causes many problems of ground and slope.
The larger the density, the lower the effective mean normal stress, the more dilative response is.
A dilative transparent fireproof coatings were based on ethanol modified urea resin as binder, phosphoric acid and starch as fire retardant.
